purpose: Track kit ownership, service surfaces, source authority blockers, manifest drift diagnostics, ActionFrame/ActionResult intake, RunnerSourceState snapshots, RunnerStepResult authority, ContactEvent replay, scene dispatch, GameHost diagnostics, and DOM-free smoke fixtures for the PrehistoricRush runner repo.

selectionPolicy.selectionReason: The central ledger showed PrehistoricRush as the oldest eligible tracked non-Cavalry Publish repo by latest review timestamp among checked accessible Publish repos.
selectionPolicy.currentRepoRole: thin publish shell for a NexusEngine-powered prehistoric infinite runner

currentRuntimeSummary.runtimeEntryStatus: src/runtime.mjs is thin and imports the active runtime directly.
currentRuntimeSummary.validationSurface: No package.json exists; validation should begin with static/source-level and DOM-free fixture smoke.

repoShouldNotOwnLongTerm: manual score and result rules that become reusable

sourceOfTruthCutover.canonicalNextSlice: PrehistoricRush Manifest Drift Gate + Replay Journal Source Lock
sourceOfTruthCutover.problem: game-scenes.json, scenes/game.json, runner-tuning.json, kit-composition.json, kit-cutover-inventory.json, and flock-generation.json define product intent, but src/runtime-terrain-v6.mjs still duplicates live tuning, scene transitions, input semantics, contact outcomes, spawn budgets, win threshold, and snapshot authority inline.
driftObserved: runtime motion speed/max/boost/turn differs from runner-tuning.json base/max/boost/turn values
runtime terrain chunk size, segments, and seed differ from runner-tuning.json terrain values
game-scenes.json uses run-over as canonical loss scene while scenes/game.json still declares nextOnLoss as fail
runtime win threshold is inline distance > 3600 instead of manifest-owned
runtime spawn counts and clear radius are inline instead of manifest-owned
runtime jump consumption is a raw boolean reset instead of an ActionFrame/RunnerStepResult fact
runtime hazard, pickup, and win outcomes mutate app.scene or runner state without durable ContactEvent records
requiredFixes: emit ManifestLoadStatus and ManifestDriftReport before changing visible behavior
normalize nextOnLoss from fail to run-over or keep fail as explicit compatibility alias only
surface loaded config, fallback status, alias status, and drift status in PrehistoricRushHost.getDiagnostics()
route button, keyboard, and future touch input through ActionFrame records
separate accepted action journal from rejected input diagnostics
route start, retry, menu, run-over, win, and run-again through SceneDispatchResult records
route movement tick, hazard hit, shard pickup, and distance goal through RunnerStepResult, RunnerEvent, and ContactEvent records
add replayable scripted fixture coverage before terrain/render/raptor/camera/Rapier extraction

missingProtoKits.reason: No current shared kit owns runner movement, jump buffer/coyote timing, speed ramp, boost, accepted action consumption, step results, and motion/animation descriptors as one reusable contract.

nextImplementationSlice.name: PrehistoricRush Manifest Drift Gate + Replay Journal Source Lock
orderedSteps: preserve the current visual Three.js/Rapier playable loop
keep inline tuning as fallback-only until drift is visible
normalize fail to run-over through an explicit compatibility alias
create ActionFrame, ActionBatch, and ActionResult records
journal accepted and rejected actions separately from raw input booleans
wrap current movement tick in RunnerStepResult without changing visible math first
record jump-consumed, boost-active, speed-delta, terrain-rebuild-requested, distance-delta, heading-delta, and grounded-change facts
wrap hazard, pickup, and goal checks into ContactEvent records
wrap all scene changes into SceneDispatchResult records
expand PrehistoricRushHost with diagnostics, snapshot, replay journal, dispatch, and runSmoke
add DOM-free smoke fixtures for manifest load, drift report, fail alias, start/retry/run-again, jump accepted/rejected, shard pickup, hazard run-over, distance win, and replay parity
defer terrain/render/raptor/camera/Rapier extraction until source-lock smokes pass
acceptanceChecks: Loading the game still shows the same playable Three.js runner.
Start, retry, and run-again still work from the current button/keyboard paths.
Space still starts from non-game scenes and jumps only inside the game scene.
PrehistoricRushHost.getReplayJournal() contains accepted and rejected ActionResult records.
Jump input produces an accepted ActionResult only when scene=game and grounded=true.
Hazard contact produces ContactEvent(type=hazard-hit) and SceneDispatchResult(to=run-over).
Shard pickup produces ContactEvent(type=shard-pickup) and a durable shard delta.
Distance goal produces ContactEvent(type=distance-goal) and SceneDispatchResult(to=win).
DOM-free runSmoke(replay-parity) can replay a scripted journal to the same public snapshot.

latestKnownRunState.notes: Documentation-only pass. Next code pass should add source-lock contracts and smoke harness before visible changes.
